release_review.summary: Patch release: stabilizes Workbench preview open handoff, consumes floe-webapp v0.36.48 widget entry motion, preserves runtime-authoritative preview state, and includes the existing Desktop runtime ownership, SSH runtime model broker, and loading-curtain improvements. No Runtime Service protocol or compatibility window changes.
release_review.same_window_rationale: The release does not add or change Runtime Service snapshot fields, sys.ping payload semantics, attach/start contracts, startup report carriers, Desktop IPC compatibility payloads, Workbench persisted layout schema versions, Env App shell readiness, or SSH bootstrap requirements. The Workbench changes stay within Env App UI state handoff and published floe-webapp rendering behavior, while the Desktop changes already operate inside the existing runtime ownership, local UI, and SSH bootstrap contracts, so the existing protocol version, compatibility epoch, minimum Desktop version, and minimum Runtime version remain valid.
checked_surfaces: Env App Workbench preview open request batching and runtime snapshot handoff
Env App Workbench file preview widget hydration and shared preview item lifecycle
floe-webapp Workbench widget entry motion through published v0.36.48 packages
Desktop local runtime ownership, lease lifecycle, and open guidance
Desktop reusable loading curtain and first-screen readiness presentation
SSH runtime model broker behavior across Desktop-managed runtimes
Runtime Workbench layout schema migration and snapshot/event APIs
Desktop managed runtime start, attach, and open gating
startup report and local-ui runtime state carriers
Env App sys.ping runtime service payload
Env App desktop first-screen readiness IPC
SSH-managed runtime bootstrap and attach flow
